channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Incoming Missile Alert Sounded In Dubai, Then A "Disregard Warning" Message

media:content.media:description: A day earlier, Iran launched a drone attack targeting a Singapore-flagged cargo ship

item.description: Since the mobile alert was the first in weeks since the ceasefire between the United States and Iran took place, it startled the residents of Dubai.
item.content:encoded: Since the mobile alert was the first in weeks since the ceasefire between the United States and Iran took place, it startled the residents of Dubai.

item.title: UN Demands Independent Probe Into ICE Custody Deaths In US

media:content.media:description: During the first five months of the year, 18 people died in ICE detention.

item.description: At least 52 deaths have been reported in ICE holding facilities since the start of 2025, when US President Donald Trump returned to office and launched a crackdown on immigrants, the UN human rights office said.
item.content:encoded: At least 52 deaths have been reported in ICE holding facilities since the start of 2025, when US President Donald Trump returned to office and launched a crackdown on immigrants, the UN human rights office said.

item.title: Woman Accused Of Poisoning, Killing 4 Grandchildren, Daughter In US

media:content.media:description: A possible motive was not disclosed by the police.

item.description: Amy Steadman, 64, has been accused of being responsible for the deaths of herself, her daughter, and the four minors, officers in Mechanicville, New York, said.
item.content:encoded: Amy Steadman, 64, has been accused of being responsible for the deaths of herself, her daughter, and the four minors, officers in Mechanicville, New York, said.

item.title: AI Chips Worth $13 Million Seized At Malaysia's Kuala Lumpur Airport

media:content.media:description: 72 server units containing advanced AI chips were found.

item.description: Malaysia imposed export controls last year on the movement of high-performance chips of US origin, following pressure from the United States to stem the flow to China of chips crucial for the development of AI.
item.content:encoded: Malaysia imposed export controls last year on the movement of high-performance chips of US origin, following pressure from the United States to stem the flow to China of chips crucial for the development of AI.

item.title: 6.5-Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Off Coast Of Philippines, No Tsunami Alert
item.description: The quake struck at a depth of 52.4 kilometres in the waters about 35 kilometres southwest of Mindanao island's Jose Abad Santos town.
item.content:encoded: The quake struck at a depth of 52.4 kilometres in the waters about 35 kilometres southwest of Mindanao island's Jose Abad Santos town.

item.title: Venezuela Quake Death Count More Than Doubles to 589, Over 2,900 injured

media:content.media:description: The state of La Guaira has been hardest hit by the 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude earthquakes.

item.description: Acting President Delcy Rodriguez made the announcement surrounded by government and military officials as she welcomed the arrival of rescue crews from all over the world.
item.content:encoded: Acting President Delcy Rodriguez made the announcement surrounded by government and military officials as she welcomed the arrival of rescue crews from all over the world.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Live: Death Count In Venezuela Earthquake More Than Doubles To 589, Over 2,980 Injured

media:content.media:description: 7.5 Magnitude Earthquake in Venezuela Updates: The first earthquake had a magnitude of 7.2

item.description: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.
item.content:encoded: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.

item.title: 'Shouldn't Become Islamabad Suburb': Denmark Pushes To Ban Public 'Azaan'

media:content.media:description: Bodskov claimed that a creeping "Islamisation" was taking up public space in Denmark

item.description: Denmark's Immigration Minister Morten Bodskov said that the call to prayer should not be heard over Danish rooftops and that it should not seem that one has ended up in Islamabad while walking through the country.
item.content:encoded: Denmark's Immigration Minister Morten Bodskov said that the call to prayer should not be heard over Danish rooftops and that it should not seem that one has ended up in Islamabad while walking through the country.

item.title: Iran Rained Drones On Major US Base. It Made America Rethink Its War Strategy

media:content.media:description: The US military said no one was killed at the base as it had moved most of the soldiers.

item.description: The base, known as Naval Support Activity Bahrain, is home to the US Navy's Fifth Fleet and acts as the command centre for American naval operations in the region.
item.content:encoded: The base, known as Naval Support Activity Bahrain, is home to the US Navy's Fifth Fleet and acts as the command centre for American naval operations in the region.

item.title: Taiwan Ship Hit By Unknown Object Near Oman Before Crossing Hormuz Strait

media:content.media:description: The company said the starboard side of the bridge of the Ever Lovely was hit a day earlier.

item.description: After an initial inspection by the crew, damage was found around the bridge windows. But the crew, vessel and cargo are all safe.
item.content:encoded: After an initial inspection by the crew, damage was found around the bridge windows. But the crew, vessel and cargo are all safe.

item.title: Cracks, Chaos, Miraculous Escape: CCTV Captures Venezuela Earthquake Horror

media:content.media:description: Two young men, one of them shirtless, sprint through the corridor in a desperate bid to get out.

item.description: The camera then records the cracks widening as the structure continues to sway.
item.content:encoded: The camera then records the cracks widening as the structure continues to sway.

item.title: Explained: How Two Massive Earthquakes Hit Venezuela Just 39 Seconds Apart

media:content.media:description: The earthquakes in Venezuela have killed 235 people and injured over 1,500.

item.description: The event, according to the US Geological Survey, was a rare phenomenon called a "doublet" that contained not one but two major earthquakes.
item.content:encoded: The event, according to the US Geological Survey, was a rare phenomenon called a "doublet" that contained not one but two major earthquakes.

item.title: Collapsed Buildings, Debris: Satellite Pics Show Impact Of Venezuela Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: Damaged apartment buildings in La Guaira. High res here

item.description: High-resolution satellite imagery sourced from Vantor confirms the widespread structural damage caused by two deadly earthquakes in Venezuela.
item.content:encoded: High-resolution satellite imagery sourced from Vantor confirms the widespread structural damage caused by two deadly earthquakes in Venezuela.

item.title: Iran Proposes $40 Billion Plan To Charge Ships In Hormuz Amid Trade Concerns

media:content.media:description: Iran and US agreed to a 60-day deal to ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz

item.description: The Strait of Hormuz is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with nearly a fifth of global oil supplies passing through it every day.
item.content:encoded: The Strait of Hormuz is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with nearly a fifth of global oil supplies passing through it every day.

item.title: Bangladesh Jamaat Steps Up Attack On PM. A Look At Its Influence On Parliament

media:content.media:description: The party won 68 seats in 2026 elections

item.description: The parliamentary election of 2026 became the greatest electoral success of Jamaat throughout its history.
item.content:encoded: The parliamentary election of 2026 became the greatest electoral success of Jamaat throughout its history.

item.title: How Gilgit-Baltistan's Sectarian Divide Was Built, Not Born
item.description: Gilgit-Baltistan (GB) was a syncretic region where Shias, Sunnis, and Ismailis coexisted, traded, and intermarried. However, over the last few decades, this social cohesion has been systematically eroded by political elites.
item.content:encoded: Gilgit-Baltistan (GB) was a syncretic region where Shias, Sunnis, and Ismailis coexisted, traded, and intermarried. However, over the last few decades, this social cohesion has been systematically eroded by political elites.

item.title: South Korea's Ex-First Lady Jailed For 7 Years In Jobs-For-Gifts Case

media:content.media:description: Kim is already serving a four-year sentence for stock manipulation and bribery.

item.description: Kim Keon Hee was found guilty of accepting "high-value precious metals" in exchange for favours in personnel appointments, according to the livestreamed ruling.
item.content:encoded: Kim Keon Hee was found guilty of accepting "high-value precious metals" in exchange for favours in personnel appointments, according to the livestreamed ruling.

item.title: "Alligator Alcatraz Fulfilled Role": US Immigration Detention Centre Shuts

media:content.media:description: Trump visited the detention site after its July 2025 opening.

item.description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, appearing at the remote Everglades site with White House border czar Tom Homan, said the facility no longer held any detainees and had fulfilled the emergency role it was built to serve.
item.content:encoded: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, appearing at the remote Everglades site with White House border czar Tom Homan, said the facility no longer held any detainees and had fulfilled the emergency role it was built to serve.

item.title: Bangladesh PM Tarique Rahman Meets Chinese President Xi Jinping In Beijing

media:content.media:description: Tarique Rahman meets Xi Jinping in Beijing.

item.description: Tarique Rahman meets Xi Jinping and signs 13 MoUs to enhance Bangladesh-China cooperation.
item.content:encoded: Tarique Rahman meets Xi Jinping and signs 13 MoUs to enhance Bangladesh-China cooperation.

item.title: "He Is In There": Venezuelan Woman Digs For Missing Son With Bare Hands

media:content.media:description: Ruined buildings and shell-shocked faces were everywhere.

item.description: Rescue teams and volunteers climbed heaps of ruins that used to be buildings as tall as 15 stories, screaming out the names of the missing.
item.content:encoded: Rescue teams and volunteers climbed heaps of ruins that used to be buildings as tall as 15 stories, screaming out the names of the missing.
